creator: gamato@users.sf.net
text:
Hmm... Port revision should start with 0, I guess..

$ diff -u Makefile~ Makefile
--- Makefile~   Tue Nov 28 19:37:59 2006
+++ Makefile    Sun Dec  3 00:01:34 2006
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=      sk-ispell
 PORTVERSION=   0.3.2
-PORTREVISION=  1
+PORTREVISION=  0
 
 MAINTAINER=    gamato@users.sf.net
